question: Which among the following is incorrectly paired?

options.1: Jagannana Chedodu : It provides a financial assistance of ₹ 10,000 per annum to Rajakas and Nayee Brahmins for better livelihood.
options.2: Jagannana Thodu : It facilitates a working capital loan up to ₹ 10,000 to the eligible poor, small and petty vendors with an intention to make them financially independent.
options.3: Jagannana Jeeva Kranthi Scheme : It aims to empower and provide social stability to women belonging to BC, SC and ST categories. The beneficiaries will receive sheep and goat units under this scheme.
options.4: YSR Navodayam Scheme : It aims to provide self-employment opportunities to the youth of Andhra Pradesh by creating job opportunities in the transport sector.
